title: Add self-inject to congress_report for closed loop

log.context: Add self-inject to congress_report for closed loop

Done. Here's what was changed:

**File modified:** `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/congress_act.py`

At the end of the `congress_report` activity (after line 969, which raises on Discord main-channel errors), I appended the inject block. It:

1. Reads `DISCORD_INJECT_SECRET` from the environment.
2. Builds a message including the session number, topic, and up to 1000 chars of the verdict.
3. POSTs to `http://127.0.0.1:9876/inject` with `chat_id` set to `main_channel_id` (already availab...(truncated)
